'''Yugami''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Yugami system/Legends|Yugami system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Its people were in a constant state of conflict with the [[Pursian]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Pursin]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 77|''Star Wars'' (1977) 77]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 77}} {{1stm}}
